arts.ttl: Preview: Rennes vs. Strasbourg - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Ligue 1 clash between Rennes and Strasbourg, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Official | Rennes’ Glen Kamara joins Al-Shabab on loan
arts.sum: Rennes midfielder Glen Kamara (29) has left Les Rouge et Noir to sign for Saudi Arabia side Al-Shabab on loan, both clubs have announced. The former Leeds midfielder only joined…

arts.ttl: Official | Rennes sign Lilian Brassier on loan
arts.sum: Brest centre-back Lilian Brassier (25) has joined Rennes on loan, both clubs have announced. Brassier’s loan move includes a €12m option to make his move permanent until 2029. The French…

arts.ttl: Official | Marseille sign Rennes’ Amine Gouiri
arts.sum: Marseille have signed Rennes winger Amine Gouiri (24), both Ligue 1 clubs have announced. The Algeria international has put pen to paper over a four-and-a-half-year deal with Les Phocéens. Marseille’s…

arts.ttl: Brighton’s Valentín Barco set for Strasbourg move
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion’s Valentín Barco (20), currently on loan at Sevilla, is set to join RC Strasbourg Alsace, according to a report from Foot Mercato. Since joining Brighton one year…

arts.ttl: USMNT Transfers: New twists in Ricardo Pepi saga at PSV, Gio Reyna continues to fight at Dortmund, Caleb Wiley on the move
arts.sum: The USMNT Transfer Notebook tracks American player movements, with latest developments for those in the U.S. national team pool We're just days away from the end of the transfer window and, at times, it looked as if sparks could fly in this final stretch.
